author: A. R. Bernard
text: Life is a series of moments. Each moment more precious then the last.

author: Cecelia Ahern
text: Life is a series of moments and moments are always changing, just like thoughts, negative and positive.

author: Dan Millman
text: Life is a series of moments. The quality of attention and action that we bring to each moment determines the quality of our lives.

author: Ichiro Kishimi
text: Yes. It is a series of moments called ‘now.’ We can live only in the here and now.

author: Rose Kennedy
text: Life isn’t a matter of milestones, but of moments.
